channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: वामदेवः
item.description: गणेशसम्बन्धः “महागणपतिं मनसा स्मरामि वसिष्ठ वामदेवादि वंदित” 18th cen मुत्तुस्वामी दीक्षितर् He’s an archaic author being the composer of much of maNDala 4 of the RV. In the purANa-s: in a version of the shivapurANa he narrates the AkhyAna-s of skanda & gaNesha. Thus, it is indeed apt here that he is mentioned as worship gaNesha. In the gaNesha purANa he curses a gandharva to become a rat, which dwells in rAma bhArgava’s Ashrama causing much trouble.
